text: If your vessel has been involved in a collision and you cannot immediately confirm if the hull is structurally sinking or stable, you should:

options.text: Abandon the vessel immediately without checking anything else
Search for missing persons, continuously monitor the structural situation, and prepare life-saving appliances for abandonment in case it becomes necessary
Go to your cabin to pack all personal belongings
Pump all ballast water out blindly

explanation: In a collision, the safety of the vessel and crew is the priority. The response must be methodical: stabilize the situation, assess damage, account for all personnel, and only abandon the ship if it is declared unsafe by the Master.
